_README: Source of truth for the Robot Fantôme shop. Edit this file, then run `python3 scripts/build_shop.py` to regenerate the shop/<id>.html product pages and the Shop-tab cards in index.html. Copy is real and photo-grounded. Prices and per-item quantities are live; products with "draft": false are for sale. Set "draft": true to pull a product back to draft (noindex, not purchasable).

products.name: Robot Fantôme sticker pack
products.tagline: Hand-drawn Robô Fantasma die-cut vinyl — slap the ghost on everything.
products.meta_description: Robot Fantôme sticker pack — hand-drawn, watercoloured Robô Fantasma die-cut vinyl stickers. Weatherproof indie / punk art stickers by Absolutely Plausible, Orlando FL.
products.description: Die-cut weatherproof vinyl stickers of Robô Fantasma — the robot-ghost mascot, inked and watercoloured by hand: a little KO'd robot with a gold ghost rising out of it, and the ghost-bot standing on its own. Two hand-drawn designs, signed by the artist. Slap them on a laptop, water bottle, guitar case, or amp.

products.name: Reclaimed pallet shoe cubby
products.tagline: Shoe rack hand-built from a single reclaimed pallet.
products.meta_description: A one-of-a-kind shoe cubby hand-built from a single reclaimed shipping pallet by Robot Fantôme. Zero-waste functional art — local pickup or freight, Orlando FL.
products.description: A wall-mounted shoe rack hand-built from one reclaimed shipping pallet — open tiers that hold a dozen-odd pairs, with the saw-marks, knots, and nail-holes of the original wood left raw. One of a kind; zero-waste functional art. Pallet artifacts are heavy and oversized — local pickup or freight only.

products.name: “Art is Local” — collage print
products.tagline: Red-and-green ransom-note collage about local art.
products.meta_description: “Art is Local” — archival print of an original hand-cut paper Robot Fantôme collage. Indie ransom-note collage art from Orlando.
products.description: An archival print of an original hand-cut paper collage — magazine letters spelling ART IS LOCAL in ransom-note red and green, layered over salvaged type.

products.name: Second-Hand-made shirt — washed Nirvana
products.tagline: Thrifted tee cut, washed, and hand-stencilled into band merch.
products.meta_description: 100% zero-waste Second-Hand-made shirt by Robot Fantôme — one thrifted Nirvana tee cut, washed, and hand-stencilled into one-of-a-kind band merch. Size M, from Orlando.
products.description: A one-of-a-kind “Second-Hand-made” shirt: a thrifted Nirvana band tee cut into a tank, bleach- and spray-washed, the hem slashed and hand-knotted into fringe, then hand-stencilled front and back with the ROBOT FANTÔME wordmark. 100% zero-waste, sustainable art — no two are alike. Size M.

products.name: “Lost Angel” — collage
products.tagline: Wine-box cardboard collage with skyline, vines, and California ghosts.
products.meta_description: “Lost Angel” — archival print of a Robot Fantôme collage built on reclaimed wine-box cardboard. Indie collage art from Orlando.
products.description: An archival print of an original collage built on a flattened “Lost Angel” Cabernet box — the wine's engraved angel reworked with a cut city-skyline spine, tomato vines, grapes, and a salvaged license plate. A play on Los Angeles, lost angels, and “Product of California.”

products.name: “Undocumented — Will Work Over or Under the Table” — collage
products.tagline: Hand-lettered cardboard satire on immigrant labor and gig work.
products.meta_description: “Undocumented — Will Work Over or Under the Table” — archival print of a hand-lettered Robot Fantôme cardboard sign. Orlando.
products.description: An archival print of an original hand-lettered cardboard piece — a street-sign-style scrawl reading “UNDOCUMENTED — WILL WORK OVER OR UNDER THE TABLE,” tagged ENGLISH · SPANISH · PORTUGUESE and “D.L. · TAX ID · LLC.” Deadpan satire on immigrant labour and the gig economy, marker on salvaged cardboard.

products.name: “Leading Ladies” — collage
products.tagline: Florida-tropical cut-paper scene with palms, dolphins, and found text.
products.meta_description: “Leading Ladies” — archival print of a tropical-Florida Robot Fantôme collage. Indie collage art from Orlando.
products.description: An archival print of an original collage — a flamingo, leaping dolphins, palms, and a starfish cut and layered with found text: “From my mistakes to my happy place,” “together,” “Leading Ladies.” A postcard from tropical Florida.

products.name: “Disruptive by Design” — collage
products.tagline: Typographic cut-paper manifesto on raw concrete.
products.meta_description: “Disruptive by Design” — archival print of a hand-cut typographic Robot Fantôme collage. Orlando.
products.description: An archival print of an original typographic collage — magazine cut-outs assembled into a manifesto: “One goal: DISRUPTIVE BY DESIGN… like a designer.” Ransom-note type on raw concrete.

products.name: Robot & monkey — print
products.tagline: Found-photo collage of a roadside robot colossus and zodiac monkey.
products.meta_description: Robot & monkey — archival print of an original found-photo Robot Fantôme collage. Indie art from Orlando.
products.description: An archival print of an original collage: a vintage photograph of a giant riveted-steel roadside robot statue, with a cut-out zodiac monkey pasted across its chest. Found image, hand-collaged.
